text:
Once upon a time in the mystical land of Everdell, there lived a dragon named Draven. Draven had scales like midnight glass and eyes the color of the deepest sea. He could breathe fire so pure it glittered like tiny diamonds. Everybody in Everdell loved Draven; he was kind-hearted and protective of his forest home.

One day, a band of greedy explorers came into the forest, their eyes fixed on Draven's Jewelstone. It wasn't just any jewelstone—it was said to be able to sing sweet songs that could make flowers bloom twice as fast.

Feeling threatened, Draven flew closer to investigate. That's when the adventurers spotted him. They didn't mean to be evil; they just couldn't resist something as shiny.

In a flurry of haste, they threw a net over him. Draven felt a cold snap as they grabbed the Jewelstone. He let out a powerful flame that engulfed the netting.

"Dangerous creatures!"
